name: retrieve_conversation_information
description: Retrieves metadata for a slack conversation by id (e.g., name, purpose, creation date, with options for member count/locale), excluding message content; requires a valid channel id.

channel.description:
The ID of the conversation (channel, direct message, or multi-person direct message) to retrieve information for.
Examples:
  "C1234567890"
  "D0G9QPYHR"
  "G01234567"

include_locale.description: If true, the response will include the locale setting for the conversation. Defaults to false.

include_num_members.description: If true, the response will include the number of members in the conversation. Defaults to false.
